description_long: This object is a highly stylized, futuristic rifle with a predominantly purple and gold color scheme accented by light blue elements. The body is angular and segmented, with a robust, armored appearance and a large, circular blue detail near the grip area. The handguard and grip are integrated into the main body, with finger-like extensions suggesting a cybernetic or robotic design. The top of the rifle features a transparent section revealing internal components, adding to its high-tech aesthetic. The rear of the rifle is open and flared, while the front is more tapered, with three prominent blue barrel-like projections. The overall design is sleek, with smooth surfaces and minimal external attachments, giving it a sci-fi, possibly non-lethal or energy-based weapon vibe.
description: A futuristic, purple and gold rifle with blue accents, featuring a robotic, segmented design and a transparent section revealing internal components. The rifle has a sleek, armored look with finger-like extensions and a high-tech aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the finger-like extensions, circular blue detail, and the transparent section on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, segmented body, blue barrel-like projections, and the smooth, streamlined profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open, flared end and the alignment of the blue barrel-like projections.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the grip integration, circular blue detail, and the overall length of the rifle.
